title: hordeum distichon subsp. zeocriton
intro: Hordeum distichon subsp. zeocriton, also known as six-row barley, is a subspecies of the Hordeum distichon plant, which belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Hordeum distichon subsp. zeocriton include its potential to help with digestive issues, lower cholesterol levels, and reduce the risk of certain diseases such as heart disease and diabetes. Hordeum distichon subsp. zeocriton is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use.
